name: get_signed_url
description: Generate a time-limited presigned URL for accessing a private file. Useful for granting temporary access to protected content.

parameters.name: fileKey
parameters.description: The key of the file to generate a signed URL for.

parameters.name: customId
parameters.description: The custom ID of the file, as an alternative to fileKey.

parameters.name: expiresIn
parameters.description: Number of seconds until the signed URL expires. Default varies by plan.
